{{ 'RESERVATION.TITLE_DETAIL' | translate }}

@if (loading) {
{{ 'INVENTORY.LOADING' | translate }}
} @if (error) {
{{ error | translate }}
} @if (!loading && !error && reservation) {
@if (reservation.reservationStatus === 'CREATED') { {{ 'RESERVATION_STATUS.CREATED' | translate }} } @if (reservation.reservationStatus === 'PICKED_UP') { {{ 'RESERVATION_STATUS.PICKED_UP' | translate }} } @if (reservation.reservationStatus === 'RETURNED') { {{ 'RESERVATION_STATUS.RETURNED' | translate }} } @if (reservation.reservationStatus === 'CANCELLED') { {{ 'RESERVATION_STATUS.CANCELLED' | translate }} }

{{ 'RESERVATION.SELECTED_EQUIPMENT' | translate }}

@if (isWithin2DaysOfStart && reservation.reservationStatus === 'CREATED') {
{{ 'RESERVATION.WARNING_2_DAY_LOCK' | translate }}
} @if (selectedEquipment.length === 0) {
{{ 'RESERVATION.NO_EQUIPMENT_SELECTED' | translate }}
} @else {
@for (item of selectedEquipment; track item.id) {

{{ item.model }}

{{ item.price | currency:'EUR':'symbol':'1.2-2':'de' }}

{{ 'EQUIPMENT_TYPE.' + item.equipmentType | translate }}

{{ 'SKILL_LEVEL.' + item.targetSkillLevel | translate }}
}
@for (item of selectedEquipment; track item.id) {

{{ item.model }}

{{ 'EQUIPMENT_TYPE.' + item.equipmentType | translate }}
{{ 'SKILL_LEVEL.' + item.targetSkillLevel | translate }}
{{ item.price | currency:'EUR':'symbol':'1.2-2':'de' }}
}
{{ 'RESERVATION.TOTAL_PRICE' | translate }}: {{ reservation.totalPrice | currency:'EUR':'symbol':'1.2-2':'de' }}
}
} @if (showDeleteModal) {
{{ 'RESERVATION.DELETE_TITLE' | translate }}

{{ 'RESERVATION.DELETE_CONFIRMATION' | translate }}

{{ 'RESERVATION.TITLE_OVERVIEW' | translate }} #{{ reservationId }}

@if (deleteError) {
{{ deleteError }}
}
}
